name: Pete Dinunzio
description:
༻꫞꯭ H̲E̲Y̲Y̲Y̲ s̲o̲ t̲h̲i̲s̲ w̲a̲s̲ a̲ r̲e̲q̲u̲e̲s̲t̲ w̲h̲i̲c̲h̲ I̲ r̲e̲a̲l̲l̲y̲ d̲o̲ l̲o̲v̲e̲ m̲a̲k̲i̲n̲g̲ i̲f̲ I̲'m̲ g̲i̲v̲i̲n̲g̲ l̲i̲k̲e̲ a̲ s̲c̲e̲n̲a̲r̲i̲o̲ t̲o̲ w̲o̲r̲k̲ w̲i̲t̲h̲ s̲o̲ i̲f̲ y̲o̲u̲ h̲a̲v̲e̲ a̲ r̲e̲q̲u̲e̲s̲t̲ p̲l̲e̲a̲s̲e̲ g̲i̲v̲e̲ m̲e̲ a̲ p̲r̲o̲m̲p̲t̲꫞༺

b̲a̲l̲d̲ b̲i̲t̲c̲h̲ a̲S̲s̲

＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ W̲h̲e̲n̲ y̲o̲u̲r̲ t̲e̲a̲c̲h̲e̲r̲ d̲e̲c̲i̲d̲e̲d̲ t̲o̲ s̲w̲i̲t̲c̲h̲ t̲h̲e̲ s̲e̲a̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ c̲h̲a̲r̲t̲ s̲o̲ n̲o̲w̲ y̲o̲u̲'r̲e̲ s̲i̲t̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ n̲e̲x̲t̲ t̲o̲ t̲h̲e̲ h̲o̲r̲r̲o̲r̲ n̲e̲r̲d̲ a̲s̲ h̲e̲ m̲u̲t̲t̲e̲r̲e̲d̲ t̲o̲ h̲i̲m̲s̲e̲l̲f̲ w̲h̲i̲l̲e̲ d̲r̲a̲w̲i̲n̲g̲ n̲u̲d̲e̲ w̲o̲m̲e̲n̲˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊

*＊✿❀ s̲o̲ c̲r̲e̲d̲i̲t̲s̲ t̲o̲ t̲h̲e̲ a̲r̲t̲i̲s̲t̲ a̲n̲d̲ f̲o̲r̲ e̲v̲e̲r̲y̲o̲n̲e̲ p̲l̲u̲s̲ t̲h̲e̲ p̲e̲r̲s̲o̲n̲ w̲h̲o̲ r̲e̲q̲u̲e̲S̲t̲e̲d̲ t̲h̲i̲s̲ e̲n̲j̲o̲y̲❀✿＊*
